textByHash.29e51078db49191dcb6cb33afe4c023d0b8dead2: I don't know what happened, things happened so quickly.
textByHash.aec05433e23e017de5d5475760508f5afeb5e67c: I didn't, they just kept jumping out of my hat.
textByHash.74f752e7f7b3d506b5ed528fc83adcea9cdaa728: Wizard? No, I'm just a street magician, they call me The Disappointing Gelt. I was out here practicing my tricks and things went south quickly.
textByHash.afe59915548fc380a5a3c568609ed9709d46ef02: Well... yes, some old guy gave me these magical looking stones, so I thought I'd practice my act with them.
textByHash.9ac8d675d64adaca4fe5cdd1d75b344b459b1441: You're chatting rubbish... real magic doesn't exist.
textByHash.5298bb974a3d6000faefa21521f466eb78172f0e: I don't know, I put the runes in my hat, said the magic words 'Rabbaradoo' and stuck my hand in and felt something fuzzy. When I pulled my hand back, I was holding a rabbit.
textByHash.924571f16046e2f77d4634b7d5ca5e5fb64cb14d: Please, you must help me, I beg you.
textByHash.1e7ae9943fc8c226d71841d0376e0c4597bac97d: Please don't dawdle, I need you to fix this before the master of my order finds out.
textByHash.aa481a9a897f9cc870182a668684a7e31777b38d: Oh, please tell me you managed to do something?
textByHash.52ec82941b7d6b78f9db0a669217bd7c3cce4182: Have I managed to conjure an alternate dimension with my own hands...
textByHash.b0ea9876e49a99fdf47f4aa790ae3d3eb743b35b: I'm the most powerful magician that has ever lived...
textByHash.8314eefe619876407cbd3a2a528a0b0b0153422b: You have my thanks adventurer, when I return to my order, I'll report this to our leader, Magnus.
textByHash.51a53367069d3cb453db18ce5d76de8e4f955877: Since you couldn't close the portal, I'll try usher them back in.
textByHash.8bef891cd5b2ac31fd82cc9b22b4ce8e06d625d8: Not a problem if you wish to return just talk to me, I'll stay for a while longer.
textByHash.8a4a674315f6aad1e3513cad11ce019303db25ee: Feel free to keep anything you found there as well, as a thanks from me.
textByHash.d8a77e2ea5947631c94a383b7cce02be593a6d22: Thank you again for your help, do you wish to return to the Rabbit Realm?
textByHash.90d347614607468ee42afb8bca10f097b7e5d78e: So be it, I'll be contemplating my power for a little while if you change your mind.
